Package index

Data Loading

Load processed AFL data from torpdata GitHub releases

load_chains()
Load Chains Data
load_ep_wp_charts()
Load EP/WP Chart Data
load_fixtures()
Load AFL Fixture Data
load_from_url()
Load parquet files from remote URLs
load_pbp()
Load Play By Play Data
load_player_details()
Load AFL Player Details Data
load_player_game_data()
Load Player Game Data
load_player_game_ratings()
Load Player Game Ratings Data
load_player_season_ratings()
Load Player Season Ratings Data
load_player_stats()
Load Player Stats Data
load_predictions()
Load AFL Match Predictions Data
load_results()
Load AFL Match Results Data
load_team_ratings()
Load Team Ratings Data
load_teams()
Load AFL Team and Lineup Data
load_torp_ratings()
Load TORP Ratings Data
load_xg()
Load Expected Goals (xG) Data
fixtures
AFL Season Fixtures

Prediction Models

Add expected points, win probability, and shot predictions to play-by-play data

add_epv_vars()
Add Expected Points Value (EPV) Variables
add_wp_vars()
Add Win Probability Variables
add_shot_vars()
Add Shot Variables

Data Cleaning

Clean and prepare AFL data for analysis

clean_pbp()
Clean Play-by-Play Data
clean_model_data_epv()
Clean Model Data for Expected Points Value (EPV)
clean_model_data_wp()
Clean Model Data for Win Probability (WP)
clean_shots_data()
Clean Shots Data
norm_name()
Normalize Player Names

Player Ratings

Calculate and view TORP player ratings

calculate_torp_ratings() torp_ratings()
Get TORP ratings
player_game_ratings()
Get game ratings
player_season_ratings()
Get season total ratings
player_profile()
Get a Player Profile
print(<torp_player_profile>)
Print a player profile
create_player_game_data()
Create Player Game Data
default_credit_params()
Default credit assignment parameters

Season Simulation

Simulate AFL seasons and predict match outcomes

simulate_season() sim_season()
Simulate a season of games

Chain Analysis

Access and analyse possession chains

get_match_chains()
Get Match Chains
get_week_chains()
Get Week Chains
load_chains()
Load Chains Data

Match Analysis

Match-level expected goals and predictions

calculate_match_xgs() match_xgs()
Calculate xGs for AFL Matches
calculate_player_stats()
Calculate player statistics
get_season_data()
Get season data
filter_game_data()
Filter game data
prepare_final_dataframe()
Prepare final dataframe

Model Validation

Evaluate model performance, calibration, and drift

evaluate_model_comprehensive()
Comprehensive Model Evaluation
compare_models_statistical()
Compare Multiple Models Statistically
create_calibration_plot()
Create Calibration Plot Data
create_validation_report()
Create Model Validation Report
create_model_comparison_report()
Create Model Comparison Report
check_wp_model_health()
Check Win Probability Model Health
get_wp_model_info()
Get Win Probability Model Version Information
log_model_performance()
Log Model Performance Metrics
monitor_model_drift()
Monitor Model Drift
validate_data_freshness()
Validate Data Freshness
validate_data_quality()
Validate Data Quality
validate_data_schema()
Validate Data Schema

Model Training

Utilities for model development and cross-validation

create_grouped_cv_folds()
Create Grouped Cross-Validation Folds
create_temporal_splits()
Time-Based Train/Validation/Test Split
select_epv_model_vars()
Select EPV Model Variables
select_wp_model_vars()
Select WP Model Variables
select_afl_model_vars()
Select AFL Match Prediction Model Variables

Caching

In-memory and disk caching utilities

clear_disk_cache()
Clear Disk Cache
clear_fixture_cache()
Clear Fixture Cache
clear_model_cache()
Clear Model Cache
clear_skip_markers()
Clear Skip Markers (Negative Cache)
get_cache_info()
Get Cache Information
get_disk_cache_info()
Get Disk Cache Information
get_disk_cache_size()
Get Disk Cache Size
get_model_cache_info()
Get Model Cache Info
set_disk_cache_options()
Set Disk Cache Options

Constants

AFL and model constants

Utilities

Helper and convenience functions

get_afl_season()
Get AFL Season
get_afl_week()
Get AFL Week
harmonic_mean()
Vectorized Harmonic Mean of Two Numeric Vectors
parquet_from_url()
Load parquet file from a remote connection
save_to_release()
Save a Data Frame to a GitHub Release via Piggyback
set_torp_data_repo()
Set TORP Data Repository
setup_torp_logging()
Setup TORP Logging Configuration
download_torp_data()
Download TORP Data for Local Storage
get_local_data_dir()
Get Local Data Directory
save_locally()
Save Data Frame Locally in torpdata/data/
set_local_data_dir()
Set Local Data Directory

Internal / Developer

Internal utilities accessible via torp::: for model training and data scraping

access_api()
Access API
get_players()
Get Players
get_round_games()
Get Round Games
get_season_games()
Get Season Games
select_shot_model_vars()
Select Shot Model Variables
predict_shot_probabilities()
Predict Shot Probabilities
